推荐场景: 餐桌聊天｜解释个人/文化习惯
60秒任务: 「解释习惯」：礼貌差异/文化误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 文化解释｜误解修复｜语气判断｜礼貌｜幽默边界｜适应
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Where I’m from, people usually ___.（说明来源文化）
It’s common to ___ in this situation.（解释常见做法）
It may seem unusual at first, but ___.（缓冲陌生感）
The reason is that ___.（说明原因）
We do it this way because ___.（解释习惯背后逻辑）
That depends on the situation.（避免绝对化）
In a formal setting, people tend to ___.（区分正式场合）
With close friends, it’s more normal to ___.（区分亲密关系）
People may see it as a sign of respect.（解释社会含义）
It’s less about rules and more about expectations.（抓住核心）
I’m still getting used to ___.（表达适应过程）
Could you explain what people usually do here?（询问本地习惯）
I’ll follow your lead on this.（跟随对方做法）
That makes sense once you know the background.（理解背景）
We may do the same thing for different reasons.（比较差异）
Let’s choose the safest option for this context.（做出稳妥选择）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: habit, custom, routine, norm, background, setting
Verbs: explain, follow, adapt, greet, offer, wait
Adjectives: formal, informal, normal, unusual, respectful, safe
Time / Place: at home, at work, in public, with friends, in a formal setting
Chunks: sign of respect, follow your lead, get used to, safest option, for different reasons, local expectation
